name: Invocations
definition: Accepted Lambda invocation count; primary demand baseline and denominator for health ratios.
absence_means: No matching traffic, wrong namespace mapping, or collector gap.
cardinality_footguns: Stay at function or region level; do not group by request-level fields.

name: Errors
definition: Function invocation errors returned to Lambda; code or dependency failure symptom.
absence_means: No recent execution failures, no traffic, or missing data.
cardinality_footguns: Keep separate from throttles because they represent different failure domains.

name: Throttles
definition: Invocations rejected because concurrency capacity was unavailable.
absence_means: No capacity rejection, no traffic, or missing data.
cardinality_footguns: Interpret against account concurrency signals before blaming one function.

name: Duration
definition: Execution duration for Lambda handler runtime; primary processing-latency signal.
absence_means: No executions in window, unsupported statistic selection, or ingest gap.
cardinality_footguns: Average can hide tails; prefer max or top-list views for triage.

name: ConcurrentExecutions
definition: Current number of in-flight Lambda executions; primary function-level saturation signal.
absence_means: Function idle, not instrumented, or namespace mismatch.
cardinality_footguns: Treat as level-like despite Tsuga catalog temporality being cumulative/summary.

name: AsyncEventsReceived
definition: Async events accepted into Lambda's internal queue.
absence_means: No async traffic, sync-only function, or missing data.
cardinality_footguns: Interpret only for async-capable workflows.

name: AsyncEventsDropped
definition: Async events dropped before successful processing.
absence_means: No async drops, async path unused, or missing data.
cardinality_footguns: Small counts still represent lost work.

name: AsyncEventAge
definition: Age of the oldest event in Lambda's async queue.
absence_means: No async backlog, async path unused, or missing data.
cardinality_footguns: Age matters more than count when consumers are delayed.

name: PostRuntimeExtensionsDuration
definition: Tail time spent after the handler returns while extensions continue processing.
absence_means: No extensions present, no executions, or feature not emitted.
cardinality_footguns: Useful only when compared to Duration; do not treat as the primary latency signal.

name: ClaimedAccountConcurrency
definition: Amount of account concurrency currently claimed by Lambda workloads; account-level saturation context.
absence_means: Metric absent if account-level concurrency export is disabled.
cardinality_footguns: Account-level only; no function grouping available.

name: UnreservedConcurrentExecutions
definition: Concurrent executions consuming the shared unreserved account pool.
absence_means: Metric absent if no unreserved concurrency activity is exported.
cardinality_footguns: Account-level only; use with throttles to spot shared-pool pressure.

name: ProvisionedConcurrentExecutions
definition: Number of provisioned execution environments actively serving work. Not found in Tsuga during Stage 2 and should remain a gated optional metric.
absence_means: Provisioned concurrency not configured, not ingested, or metric family absent.
cardinality_footguns: Keep gated until Tsuga discovery confirms availability.

name: ProvisionedConcurrencyUtilization
definition: Share of provisioned concurrency in use. Not found in Tsuga during Stage 2 and should remain gated.
absence_means: Provisioned concurrency not enabled or not ingested.
cardinality_footguns: Do not compare across functions unless the feature exists and is standardized.

name: ProvisionedConcurrencyInvocations
definition: Invocations served by provisioned concurrency environments. Not found in Tsuga during Stage 2.
absence_means: Provisioned concurrency not enabled, not ingested, or no traffic.
cardinality_footguns: Use with spillover only when Tsuga actually exports both metrics.

name: ProvisionedConcurrencySpilloverInvocations
definition: Invocations that overflowed provisioned concurrency. Not found in Tsuga during Stage 2.
absence_means: Provisioned concurrency not enabled, not ingested, or no spillover.
cardinality_footguns: Keep gated until discovered.

name: DeadLetterErrors
definition: Failures while writing failed async events to the configured dead-letter queue. Not found in Tsuga during Stage 2.
absence_means: No async dead-letter delivery failures, async path unused, or metric absent in Tsuga.
cardinality_footguns: Keep out of synchronous sections and gate until discovery confirms presence.

name: DestinationDeliveryFailures
definition: Failures while writing async invocation records to a configured destination. Not found in Tsuga during Stage 2.
absence_means: No destination failures, async destinations unused, or metric absent in Tsuga.
cardinality_footguns: Keep gated until discovered.

name: RecursiveInvocationsDropped
definition: Invocations Lambda dropped after detecting a recursive loop. Not found in Tsuga during Stage 2.
absence_means: No recursive loop detection events or metric absent in Tsuga.
cardinality_footguns: Keep as documented but gated; even small counts would be high signal if the metric appears later.

name: IteratorAge
definition: Age of the last record for Kinesis and DynamoDB Streams event source mappings. Not found in Tsuga during Stage 2.
absence_means: No stream backlog, stream source unused, or metric absent in Tsuga.
cardinality_footguns: Do not pretend mapping-level drilldown exists without discovered mapping attributes.

name: OffsetLag
definition: Kafka offset lag observed by the event source mapping. Not found in Tsuga during Stage 2.
absence_means: No Kafka-backed mapping, no backlog, or metric absent in Tsuga.
cardinality_footguns: Keep gated until Tsuga confirms both the metric and useful dimensions.

name: OversizedRecordCount
definition: Kafka records skipped because the event exceeded Lambda's size limits. Not found in Tsuga during Stage 2.
absence_means: No oversized Kafka records, Kafka unused, or metric absent in Tsuga.
cardinality_footguns: A small count would still matter, but the metric is not currently exported in Tsuga.

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: CloudWatch Lambda service metrics do not expose direct spend. Use invocation volume, duration, concurrency, and unreserved-pool pressure as cost-adjacent proxies until billing data is integrated.
absence_means: Not applicable in the core metric family.
cardinality_footguns: Do not invent cost widgets from runtime metrics alone.
